data.body: AC amendment (gap-1): Add test coverage for --format=llm path and TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR override. Add: test_ticket_show_llm_format_is_minified (assert output is single-line JSON, no newlines), test_ticket_show_honors_tickets_tracker_dir (set TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR to fixture dir, assert ticket resolved from there). Without these, format handling and env var precedence can silently regress.
